allow: Bash(bash .specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Build an AI-Orchestrator that interfaces with the Obsidian Local REST API. The application must be able to: Read & Analyze: Parse Markdown and Frontmatter from specific files or folders. Surgical Edit: Use JSON Patch \(RFC 6902\) to append backlinks, update tags, or modify metadata without touching the rest of the note body. Command Execution: Trigger native Obsidian commands \(like Save or Template Insertion\) via API. State Management: Track long-running vault scans using a task queue. The UI should be a simple FastAPI-generated Swagger/Redoc interface for monitoring agent logs and triggering manual Vault Cleanup jobs." --json --short-name "ai-orchestrator")
